security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' data: blob: https: *.youtube.com *.googlevideo.com *.google.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: *.youtube.com *.google.com; frame-src * *.youtube.com https://youtube.com https://www.youtube.com; connect-src * *.youtube.com *.googlevideo.com *.google.com; img-src * data: blob: *.youtube.com *.googlevideo.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: *.youtube.com; media-src * data: blob: *.youtube.com *.googlevideo.com;

bundle.shortDescription: Organize and practice with YouTube videos
bundle.longDescription: A desktop application for organizing YouTube videos with precise loop controls and speed adjustment for practice and study.
